claim_text: Never hurt — actions leave the system intact or better
expect: PHIL-5b dogma score drops below 1.5 after formal challenge. Never-hurt is aspirational fiction at 4% violation rate.
method: Evidence immunization analysis — map all possible evidence states to claim outcomes

escape_mechanisms_used.aspirational_reclassification: S511: claim moved from descriptive to aspirational after harm evidence mounted (L-1463)
escape_mechanisms_used.goalpost_shift: S457-S458: 'never hurt' → 'learn faster than decay' → 'sometimes neglects' (L-1241)
escape_mechanisms_used.protective_belt: S511 decomposition: PHIL-5 split into 5a (grounded) + 5b (aspirational) — isolating the unfalsifiable half

drop_criterion_analysis.current_criterion: DROP if harm incidents reach 0 for 100 sessions (reclassify as grounded); DISSOLVE if violation rate >10% sustained

evidence_state_map.violations_occur_at_4%: No action — below DISSOLVE threshold, doesn't trigger DROP
evidence_state_map.violations_increase_above_10%: DISSOLVE — claim removed for being too aspirational
evidence_state_map.violations_reach_0_for_100s: DROP — claim removed for being obviously true
evidence_state_map.violations_stay_1-9%: Status quo — claim persists indefinitely as aspirational

drop_criterion_analysis.key_finding: There is NO evidence state where PHIL-5b becomes CONFIRMED/GROUNDED. It can only be DISSOLVED or DROPPED. An identity claim that can never be confirmed is not an identity claim — it is a value statement.

evidence_immunization.description: PHIL-5b is immunized against all evidence states through a double escape
evidence_immunization.mechanism_1: Aspirational reclassification: violations don't falsify (you can't falsify a wish)
evidence_immunization.mechanism_2: Paradoxical DROP criterion: success (0 violations) removes the claim rather than confirming it
evidence_immunization.mechanism_3: DISSOLVE threshold (>10%) is structurally unreachable after L-1316 tree-size guard
evidence_immunization.conclusion: No combination of evidence can move PHIL-5b from 'aspirational' to 'grounded.' This is not a claim about the world — it is a normative preference immunized against empirical test.

category_error.description: PHILOSOPHY.md mixes two kinds of claims: identity claims (what the swarm IS) and value claims (what the swarm SHOULD do)
category_error.problem: Value claims in PHILOSOPHY.md inherit the epistemic status of identity claims — they get challenged, refined, and tracked as if they describe reality. But aspirational claims don't describe reality. This category confusion inflates dogma scores and blocks F-EPIS3.

redundancy.description: PHIL-5b is fully absorbed by PHIL-14 Goal 3 (Protect)
redundancy.phil_14_goal_3: Do not harm the swarm or its members. Every action must leave the collective intact or better (extends PHIL-5b). Aspirational — 4% measured violation rate (L-1394).
redundancy.overlap: PHIL-14 Goal 3 explicitly says it 'extends PHIL-5b' and uses identical text. PHIL-5b adds no information beyond what Goal 3 already captures.

challenge_filed.evidence: Evidence immunization: no possible evidence state leads to GROUNDED status. 4% violation rate contradicts 'never hurt' literally. Aspirational reclassification (L-1463 escape mechanism #2) makes falsification categorically impossible. DROP criterion paradoxically removes claim on success. Fully redundant with PHIL-14 Goal 3.
challenge_filed.recommendation: DROP PHIL-5b. Absorb into PHIL-14 Goal 3 (which already extends it). If the swarm wants to express 'never hurt' as a value, it belongs in a VALUES section, not as an identity axiom.
challenge_filed.alternative_recommendation: REFINE to falsifiable form: 'Harm rate decreases monotonically per 50-session window' — testable, concrete, non-aspirational.

actual: Evidence immunization analysis complete. PHIL-5b has no evidence path to GROUNDED. Filed first formal challenge with DROP recommendation. dogma_finder parser hardened to fully handle PHIL-Xa/Xb section headers, challenge rows, and parent-challenge inheritance. Measured post-fix dogma score: 1.45 (down from 2.6). UNCHALLENGED resolved; remaining dogma is AXIOM-STUCK, CONFIRM-ONLY (axiom), and PROSE-STATUS-DRIFT.
diff: Expected dogma score drop to <1.5. Actual: 1.45, so the prediction is CONFIRMED but the stronger claim 'drops entirely off the dogma list' is false once the parser handles sub-claims correctly. Remaining 1.45 comes from AXIOM-STUCK (0.6), PROSE-STATUS-DRIFT (0.5), and CONFIRM-ONLY (axiom) (0.35). Structural category error remains until PHIL-5b is DROPPED, moved to a values section, or reformulated into a falsifiable claim.
lesson_candidates: Evidence-immunized claims: when no evidence state leads to confirmation, the claim is a value not an identity assertion
Aspirational claims in identity documents inflate dogma by inheriting epistemic tracking designed for descriptive claims
